subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-13 in Budapest
subcodes.first_line: Last night, I spoke to you of the life of Baha'u'llah; remember it well.  This Cause is just beginning to dawn in Europe
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیشب شرح حیات حضرت بهآءالله را برای شما گفتم آن را درست یاد نمائید حالا در اروپا
subcodes.subjects: @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @growth of the Cause, @suffering; rejection of Christ
